name: Razor
description: I bring my lightning whip not to punish souls, but only to hasten them toward the inevitable exit.

abilities.name: Unstable Current
abilities.description: Grants movement speed bonus per hero level.

abilities.name: Dynamo
abilities.description: Grants bonus spell amplification per current total attack damage.

abilities.name: Plasma Field
abilities.description: Releases a plasma wave that grows in power as it expands, but also zaps on contraction, slowing and dealing damage to enemy units caught in its path. Each enemy unit can be hit twice, once each upon expanding and contracting. The further the distance, the stronger the effect.

abilities.name: Static Link
abilities.description: Allows Razor to attack while moving with the link active. Grants Razor bonus attack damage incrementally while being linked to the enemy unit. Applies the ability to both the primary and secondary targets. If any of link instances are broken, attacks the currently linked enemy unit. Can be cast multiple times on the primary unit-targeted enemy, but not on the secondary affected unit.

abilities.name: Storm Surge
abilities.description: Forked Lightning always searches for additional targets centered around the primary target, damaging and applying its movement speed slow independently to both the primary target and secondary targets. Additionally reduces the downtime.

abilities.name: Eye of the Storm
abilities.description: A powerful lightning storm strikes out at enemy units with the lowest health, dealing damage and reducing their armor. Creates two eyes within the storm to strike two different units at the same time. Enables damaging buildings. The jolts will only target towers, barracks, and the Ancient.
